channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sony’s WH-CH720N headphones offer excellent value at full price, but right now they're a steal.
item.description: Sony’s WH-CH720N headphones offer excellent value at full price, but right now they're a steal.

item.title: Wikipedia blacklists Archive.today after alleged DDoS attack
item.description: Wikipedia editors have decided to remove all links to Archive.today, a web archiving service that they said has been linked to more than 695,000 times...

item.title: Microsoft’s new gaming CEO vows not to flood the ecosystem with ‘endless AI slop’
item.description: Is Microsoft's gaming division doubling down on AI?

item.title: Google VP warns that two types of AI startups may not survive
item.description: As generative AI evolves, a Google VP warns that LLM wrappers and AI aggregators face mounting pressure, with shrinking margins and limited differenti...

item.title: 7 days until ticket prices rise for TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
item.description: Lowest ticket prices to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 end February 27. Up to $680 off individual passes and up to 30% off group passes. Register before they...

item.title: OpenAI debated calling police about suspected Canadian shooter’s chats
item.description: Jesse Van Rootselaar's descriptions of gun violence were flagged by tools that monitor ChatGPT for misuse.

item.title: Souvenirs From the 2026 Winter Olympics Are Being Resold for Big Bucks Online
item.description: From pins to mascots to Swatch watches, memorabilia from the Milano Cortina Games is showing up on sites like eBay and Vinted.

item.title: Password Managers Share a Hidden Weakness
item.description: Plus: The cybersecurity community grapples with Epstein files revelations, the US State Department plans an online anti-censorship “portal” for the wo...

item.title: Best Budget Monitors: I Found 3 Impressive Screens Under $200 (2026)
item.description: You might assume all monitors under $200 are terrible. But after trying some out, I found a few that defy expectations.

item.title: 6 Best Phones With Headphone Jacks (2026), Tested and Reviewed
item.description: Headphone jacks are endangered, but they’re not gone. Here are our favorite smartphones that still let you plug and play.
